name: WF2 - CargoLink Process Quotation Replies (AI + 3-Quote Limit)

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM forwarders WHERE LOWER(email) = LOWER('{{ $json.sender_email }}') AND (status = 'APPROVED' OR status = 'ACTIVE')
SELECT status, quotation_count FROM requests WHERE request_id = '{{ $('Code - Extract Request ID').first().json.request_id }}'
SELECT COUNT(*) as existing_count FROM quotations WHERE request_id = '{{ $('Code - Extract Request ID').first().json.request_id }}'

SELECT COUNT(*) as duplicate_count FROM quotations WHERE request_id = '{{ $('Code - Extract Request ID').first().json.request_id }}' AND forwarder_id = '{{ $('PostgreSQL - Verify Forwarder').first().json.forwarder_id }}'
UPDATE requests SET quotation_count = quotation_count + 1 WHERE request_id = '{{ $('Code - Extract Request ID').first().json.request_id }}'

INSERT INTO forwarder_bid_status (forwarder_id, request_id, status, quoted_price, attempted_at, quoted_at) VALUES ('{{ $('Code - Validate AI Output').first().json.forwarder_id }}', '{{ $('Code - Validate AI Output').first().json.request_id }}', 'ANSWERED', {{ $('Code - Validate AI Output').first().json.total_price }}, NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (forwarder_id, request_id) DO UPDATE SET status = 'ANSWERED', quoted_price = EXCLUDED.quoted_price, quoted_at = NOW()
SELECT request_id, quotation_count FROM requests WHERE request_id = '{{ $('Code - Extract Request ID').first().json.request_id }}'
SELECT u.email, u.full_name FROM requests r JOIN users u ON u.sovereign_id = r.user_sovereign_id WHERE r.request_id = '{{ $('Code - Extract Request ID').first().json.request_id }}'

parameters.subject: =🎉 New quote received for {{ $('Code - Extract Request ID').first().json.request_id }}
parameters.message:
=

🎉 New Quotation Received!

Dear {{ $json.full_name }},

A new quotation has been submitted for {{ $('Code - Extract Request ID').first().json.request_id }}.

{{ $('Code - Validate AI Output').first().json.forwarder_company }}

{{ $('Code - Validate AI Output').first().json.currency }} {{ $('Code - Validate AI Output').first().json.total_price }}

Transit: {{ $('Code - Validate AI Output').first().json.transit_days || 'TBD' }} days via {{ $('Code - Validate AI Output').first().json.carrier }}

Quotes received: {{ $('PostgreSQL - Get Updated Count').first().json.quotation_count }}/3

parameters.subject: =✅ Your quote for {{ $('Code - Extract Request ID').first().json.request_id }} received
parameters.message:
=

✅ Quotation Submitted!

Dear {{ $('PostgreSQL - Verify Forwarder').first().json.company_name }},

Your quotation for {{ $('Code - Extract Request ID').first().json.request_id }} has been received and processed.

✓ STATUS: ANSWERED

  • Price: {{ $('Code - Validate AI Output').first().json.currency }} {{ $('Code - Validate AI Output').first().json.total_price }}
  • Transit: {{ $('Code - Validate AI Output').first().json.transit_days || 'TBD' }} days
  • Valid for: {{ $('Code - Validate AI Output').first().json.validity_days }} days

parameters.query: INSERT INTO n8n_events_logs (event_type, request_id, description) VALUES ('QUOTE_RECEIVED', '{{ $('Code - Extract Request ID').first().json.request_id }}', 'Quote from {{ $('Code - Validate AI Output').first().json.forwarder_company }}') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

parameters.subject: =❌ Quote DECLINED - {{ $('Code - Extract Request ID').first().json.request_id }} already has 3 quotes
parameters.message:
=

Thank you for your quote. This request already has 3 quotations and is now closed.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO forwarder_bid_status (request_id, forwarder_id, status, attempted_at) VALUES ('{{ $('Code - Extract Request ID').first().json.request_id }}', '{{ $('PostgreSQL - Verify Forwarder').first().json.forwarder_id }}', 'DECLINED_LATE', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (request_id, forwarder_id) DO UPDATE SET status = EXCLUDED.status, attempted_at = EXCLUDED.attempted_at

INSERT INTO rejected_attempts (timestamp, sender_email, request_id, error_type, error_message) VALUES (NOW(), '{{ $('Code - Extract Request ID').first().json.sender_email }}', '{{ $('Code - Extract Request ID').first().json.request_id }}', 'REJECTED', 'Quote rejected') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

parameters.subject: =❌ Request CLOSED - {{ $('Code - Extract Request ID').first().json.request_id }}
parameters.message:
=This request is CLOSED and no longer accepting quotations. Thank you for your interest.

CargoLink Platform

parameters.query: INSERT INTO forwarder_bid_status (request_id, forwarder_id, status, attempted_at) VALUES ('{{ $('Code - Extract Request ID').first().json.request_id }}', '{{ $('PostgreSQL - Verify Forwarder').first().json.forwarder_id }}', 'DUPLICATE', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (request_id, forwarder_id) DO UPDATE SET status = EXCLUDED.status, attempted_at = EXCLUDED.attempted_at

parameters.subject: ❌ Registration Required - CargoLink Platform
parameters.message:
=Your email ({{ $('Code - Extract Request ID').first().json.sender_email }}) is not registered in our CargoLink partner network.

Please register at: https://cargolink.sa/forwarders/register

CargoLink Platform
